name: CARLSMED, INC.
summary: Carlsmed, Inc. is a commercial-stage medical technology company offering the aprevo Technology Platform, an AI-enabled personalized spine surgery solution. The platform combines AI-driven pre-operative planning software, custom-designed interbody implants tailored to each patient's unique vertebral bone topography, and single-use surgical instruments. It targets lumbar and cervical spine fusion surgeries for conditions including degenerative disc disease and adult spinal deformity, aiming to improve surgical outcomes and reduce revision surgeries.

products.name: aprevo Technology Platform
products.description: End-to-end AI-enabled platform providing personalized digital surgical plans, custom interbody implants, and single-use instruments for lumbar and cervical spine fusion surgery.

products.name: aprevo Lumbar Interbody Implants
products.description: FDA 510(k)-cleared custom interbody implants for lumbar spine fusion, designed for each patient's unique anatomy and pathology.

products.name: aprevo Cervical Interbody Implants
products.description: FDA 510(k)-cleared custom interbody implants for cervical spine fusion, received FDA Breakthrough Device Designation prior to clearance.

products.name: myaprevo
products.description: AI-enabled pre-operative planning software utilizing standard-of-care diagnostic imaging and outcome-based algorithms to develop personalized surgical plans.
